name: cyware-ctix
label: Cyware CTIX
description: Allows user to search for URL, Domain and IP,Hash and CVE ID, chooses the matching element, and displays relevant details.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: server
fields.description: Specify the URL of the CTIX server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.
fields.tooltip: URL of the CTIX server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.

fields.title: Access ID
fields.name: access_id
fields.description: Specify the Access ID configured for your CTIX server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Access ID configured for your CTIX server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.

fields.title: Secret Key
fields.name: secret_key
fields.description: Specify the Secret Key configured for your CTIX server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Secret Key configured for your CTIX server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. By default, this option is set as True.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. By default, this option is set as True.

operations.title: Search Domain
operations.description: Searches for a domain in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the domain name you have specified.

parameters.title: Domain
parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Name of the domain whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.
parameters.tooltip: Name of the domain whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: (Optional) Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.
parameters.tooltip: Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.

operations.title: Search IP
operations.description: Searches for an IP address in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the IP address you have specified.

parameters.title: IP Address
parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.
parameters.tooltip: IP address whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: (Optional) Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.
parameters.tooltip: Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.

operations.title: Search URL
operations.description: Searches for a URL in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the URL you have specified.

parameters.title: URL
parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.
parameters.tooltip: URL whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: (Optional) Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.
parameters.tooltip: Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.

operations.title: Search Hash
operations.description: Searches for a hash in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the hash value you have specified.

parameters.title: Hash
parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Value of the hash whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.
parameters.tooltip: Value of the hash whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: (Optional) Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.
parameters.tooltip: Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.

operations.title: Search CVE ID
operations.description: Searches for a CVE ID in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the ID of the CVE you have specified.

parameters.title: CVE ID
parameters.name: cve_id
parameters.description: ID of the CVE whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.
parameters.tooltip: ID of the CVE whose information you want to retrieve from CTIX.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: (Optional) Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.
parameters.tooltip: Number of record requests that should be included per page. By default, this is set to 20.

operations.title: Bulk Lookup and Create (Deprecated)
operations.description: Performs a bulk IOC lookup by fetching a list of threat data objects present in the CTIX application. If some IOCs are not present in the application, then you can choose to ingest the missing IOCs and create new records. NOTE: You can perform the lookup and further ingest a maximum of 1000 IOCs in the application at any moment.

parameters.title: Indicator Values
parameters.name: ioc_values
parameters.description: Specify the list of values to be used by IOCs to perform the lookup.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the list of values to be used by IOCs to perform the lookup.

parameters.title: Create Records
parameters.name: create
parameters.description: Select this checkbox, i.e., set it to 'True', if you want to create records of the IOCs that were not present in the CTIX platform while performing the lookup. By default this checkbox is not selected, i.e. it is set as 'False'.
parameters.tooltip: Select this checkbox, i.e., set it to 'True', if you want to create records of the IOCs that were not present in the CTIX platform while performing the lookup. By default this checkbox is not selected, i.e. it is set as 'False'.

parameters.title: Enrich Records
parameters.name: enrichment
parameters.description: Select this checkbox, i.e., set it to 'True', to add the last enriched information for each enriched object found during the lookup. By default this checkbox is not selected, i.e. it is set as 'False'.
parameters.tooltip: Select this checkbox, i.e., set it to 'True', to add the last enriched information for each enriched object found during the lookup. By default this checkbox is not selected, i.e. it is set as 'False'.

parameters.title: Metadata
parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify any additional information such as TLP, confidence score, etc., in the JSON format to be included with the object while creating records.
parameters.tooltip: Specify any additional information such as TLP, confidence score, etc., in the JSON format to be included with the object while creating records.

parameters.title: Source
parameters.name: source
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the source name that you want to map to the threat data objects.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the source name that you want to map to the threat data objects.

parameters.title: Collection
parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the collection name that you want to map to the threat data objects.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the collection name that you want to map to the threat data objects.

operations.title: Create Intel via Open API
operations.description: Create intel with additional details such as the source and collection. You can also include details for each object, such as description, notes, custom attributes, and more.

parameters.title: Title
parameters.name: title
parameters.tooltip: Pass the title of the intel within 100 characters.

parameters.title: All SDOS
parameters.name: allSDOS
parameters.tooltip: Pass the SDO and IOC objects to add to the intel. For more information, see The All SDOs Object.

parameters.title: Source
parameters.name: source
parameters.tooltip: Pass the name of the source to map the intel.If the passed source name does not exists in the platform, then a new source is automatically created in the Miscellaneous source category.

parameters.title: Collection
parameters.name: collection
parameters.tooltip:
Pass the name of the source collection to associate with the source.
If the passed collection name does not exists in the platform, then a new collection is automatically created.

parameters.title: Metadata
parameters.name: metadata
parameters.tooltip: Pass additional information to associate with the intel.

operations.title: Get Threat Data
operations.description: Returns a list of threat data objects from the CTIX application. You can retrieve a maximum of 500,000 threat data objects using this API.

parameters.title: Query
parameters.name: query
parameters.tooltip: Pass a CQL query to filter and fetch results.

parameters.title: Page
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Pass the page number to filter threat data objects by page number.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.tooltip: Pass the number of records per page to filter the threat data objects by page size.

parameters.title: Page Limit
parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.tooltip: Pass the number of threat data objects to be retrieved.

parameters.title: Enrichment
parameters.name: enrichment
parameters.tooltip: Pass true to retrieve the details of the last enrichment for the objects that can be enriched.

operations.title: Bulk Add Relation
operations.description: Add a relation to multiple threat data objects.

parameters.title: Object Ids
parameters.name: object_ids
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of threat data object IDs to perform the bulk action. To retrieve a list of object IDs, use the List Threat Data API under the Threat Data section.

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of threat data objects. To get the list of supported object types, see Supported SDO Types in Threat Data > Miscellaneous.

parameters.title: Data
parameters.name: data
parameters.tooltip: Pass the additional data to pass with the request.

operations.title: Bulk Deprecate/Undeprecate Objects
operations.description: Deprecate or undeprecate multiple threat data objects with one API request.

parameters.title: Object Ids
parameters.name: object_ids
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of threat data object IDs to perform the bulk action. To retrieve a list of object IDs, use the List Threat Data API under the Threat Data section.

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of threat data objects. To get the list of supported object types, see Supported SDO Types in Threat Data > Miscellaneous.

parameters.title: Action Type
parameters.name: action_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass deprecate objects. Pass un_deprecate to undeprecate objects.

operations.title: Bulk Mark/Unmark False Positive
operations.description: Mark or unmark multiple IOCs as false positives.

parameters.title: Object Ids
parameters.name: object_ids
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of threat data object IDs to perform the bulk action. To retrieve a list of object IDs, use the List Threat Data API under the Threat Data section

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of threat data objects. To get the list of supported object types, see Supported SDO Types in Threat Data > Miscellaneous.

parameters.title: Action Type
parameters.name: action_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass false_positive to mark IOCs as false positives. Pass un_false_positive to unmark an IOCs as false positives.

operations.title: Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel
operations.description: Performs a bulk IOC lookup by fetching a list of threat data objects present in the CTIX application. If some IOCs are not present in the application, then you can choose to ingest the missing IOCs and create new records. NOTE: You can perform the lookup and further ingest a maximum of 1000 IOCs in the application at any moment.

parameters.title: Indicator Values
parameters.name: ioc_values
parameters.tooltip: Specify a comma-separated list of values to be used by IOCs to perform the lookup.

parameters.title: Source
parameters.name: source
parameters.tooltip: Specify the source name that you want to map to the threat data objects.

parameters.title: Collection
parameters.name: collection
parameters.tooltip: Specify the collection name that you want to map to the threat data objects. If the passed source name does not exists in the platform, then a new source is automatically created with the suffix (OpenAPI) in the Miscellaneous source category.

parameters.title: Metadata
parameters.name: metadata
parameters.tooltip: Specify any additional information such as TLP, confidence score, etc., in the JSON format to be included with the object while creating records.

parameters.title: Create Records
parameters.name: create
parameters.tooltip: Select this checkbox, i.e., set it to 'True', if you want to create records of the IOCs that were not present in the CTIX platform while performing the lookup. By default this checkbox is not selected, i.e. it is set as 'False'.

parameters.title: Enrich Records
parameters.name: enrichment
parameters.tooltip: Select this checkbox, i.e., set it to 'True', to add the last enriched information for each enriched object found during the lookup. By default this checkbox is not selected, i.e. it is set as 'False'.

operations.title: Bulk IOC Lookup (Advanced)
operations.description: Performs a lookup for threat data objects in the CTIX platform and retrieves the details of the objects, such as basic details, enriched data, and relations.

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass an object type to lookup. For the list of supported object types, see Supported SDO Types in Threat Data > Miscellaneous.

parameters.title: Value
parameters.name: value
parameters.tooltip: Pass a list of up to 100 threat data object values to look up.

parameters.title: Object ID
parameters.name: objectID
parameters.tooltip: Pass a list of up to 100 threat data object IDs to look up.

parameters.title: Enrichment Data
parameters.name: enrichment_data
parameters.tooltip: Pass true to retrieve the latest five enrichment data objects.

parameters.title: Relation Data
parameters.name: relation_data
parameters.tooltip: Pass true to retrieve the latest 100 relations details.

parameters.title: Enrichment Tools
parameters.name: enrichment_tools
parameters.tooltip: Pass the name of up to five enrichment tools separated by a comma.

parameters.title: Fields
parameters.name: fields
parameters.tooltip: Pass a comma-separated list of field names to retrieve specific details of the objects. By default, all fields are retrieved.

operations.title: Get Threat Data Object Details List
operations.description: Returns basic correlated details of a threat data object in Intel Exchange.

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of the object such as indicator, vulnerability, malware, and more.

parameters.title: Object ID
parameters.name: objectID
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of the object to retrieve the details.

operations.title: Get Threat Data Object Additional Details
operations.description: Retrieves additional information of a threat data object, such as, kill chain phases and published collections.

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of the object such as indicator, vulnerability, malware, and more.

parameters.title: Object ID
parameters.name: object_id
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of the object to retrieve the details.

operations.title: Get Relations List of Threat Data Object
operations.description: Retrieves the list of relations and the relation details of a threat data object.

parameters.title: Sources
parameters.name: sources
parameters.tooltip: Pass the IDs of the sources to filter results.

parameters.title: Page
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Pass the page number to retrieve relations.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.tooltip: Pass the number of records to retrieve per page.

operations.title: Create Threat Bulletin
operations.description: Creates a threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Title
parameters.name: title
parameters.tooltip: Pass the title for the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Description
parameters.name: description
parameters.tooltip: Pass the description for the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.tooltip: Pass the status of the creation of the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Tlp
parameters.name: tlp
parameters.tooltip: Pass the TLP for the threat bulletin

parameters.title: Server Collections
parameters.name: server_collections
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of server collections

parameters.title: Tags
parameters.name: tags
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of tags

parameters.title: Attachments
parameters.name: attachments
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of attachments

operations.title: Update Threat Bulletin
operations.description: Updates the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Threat Bulletin Id
parameters.name: threat_bulletin_id
parameters.tooltip: Threat Bulletin ID

parameters.title: Title
parameters.name: title
parameters.tooltip: Pass the title for the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Description
parameters.name: description
parameters.tooltip: Pass the description for the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.tooltip: Pass the status of creation.

parameters.title: Tlp
parameters.name: tlp
parameters.tooltip: Pass the TLP for the threat bulletin.

parameters.title: Server Collections
parameters.name: server_collections
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of server collections.

parameters.title: Tags
parameters.name: tags
parameters.tooltip: Pass the comma-separated list of tags

operations.title: List Rules
operations.description: Retrieves a list of rules from the platform.

parameters.title: Page
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Pass the page number to retrieve rules.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.tooltip: Pass the number of rules to retrieve per page.

parameters.title: Source
parameters.name: source
parameters.tooltip: Pass a comma-separated list of source IDs to filter rules.

parameters.title: Created By ID
parameters.name: createdByID
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of the creator of the rules to filter.

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.tooltip: Pass the status of the rules. Allowed values: DRAFT, ACTIVE, INACTIVE. By default, rules with all status are retrieved.

parameters.title: Last Active To
parameters.name: lastActiveTo
parameters.tooltip: Pass the last active time in EPOCH format to filter rules.

parameters.title: Last Active From
parameters.name: lastActiveFrom
parameters.tooltip: Pass the last active time in EPOCH format to filter rules.

parameters.title: Created From
parameters.name: createdFrom
parameters.tooltip: Pass the creation time in EPOCH format to filter rules.

parameters.title: Created To
parameters.name: createdTo
parameters.tooltip: Pass the creation time in EPOCH format to filter rules.

parameters.title: Is Manual Run
parameters.name: isManualRun
parameters.tooltip: Check to retrieve rules that are configured for manual execution only

operations.title: Run Rule
operations.description: Runs a rule asynchronously on the existing threat data created in the specified time interval.

parameters.title: Rule
parameters.name: rule
parameters.tooltip: Pass the unique ID of a rule.

parameters.title: Start Time
parameters.name: startTime
parameters.tooltip: Filters threat data objects that are created after the passed timestamp value.

parameters.title: End Time
parameters.name: endTime
parameters.tooltip: Filters threat data objects that are created before the passed timestamp value.

operations.title: Get Enrichment Tool List
operations.description: Returns the list of enrichment tools configured in Intel Exchange.

parameters.title: Action Name
parameters.name: action_name
parameters.tooltip: Specify a list of comma-separated action names, for example: get_ip for IPs, get_domain for Domain, get_url for URL, get_cve for Vulnerability

parameters.title: Component
parameters.name: component
parameters.tooltip: Use this filter to get the enrichment tools list by a component. For example, if you specify the component as investigation, it returns only those apps whose enrichment is supported in threat-investigation

parameters.title: Full List
parameters.name: full_list
parameters.tooltip: Use this filter to get action separated tools together

operations.title: Get Enrichment Object Details
operations.description: Retrieves the enrichment data for the given object and tool ID.

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of object to retrieve enrichment details.

parameters.title: Object ID
parameters.name: objectID
parameters.tooltip: Pass the object ID to retrieve the enrichment details.

parameters.title: Tool ID
parameters.name: toolID
parameters.tooltip: Pass the tool ID to retrieve the enrichment details.

operations.title: Get Enriched Threat Data
operations.description: Returns the enriched data of a threat data object using enrichment tools.

parameters.title: App Slug
parameters.name: app_slug
parameters.tooltip: Pass the slug of an enrichment tool to retrieve its enriched data. To retrieve the slug of an enrichment tool, use the GET Enrichment Tools API endpoint.

parameters.title: Value
parameters.name: value
parameters.tooltip: Pass the value of the object. For example, sco, vulnerability, and more.

parameters.title: Action Slug
parameters.name: action_slug
parameters.tooltip: Pass the enrichment action name to retrieve specific details. For example, get_ip for IPs, get_domain for Domain, get_url for URL, get_cve for Vulnerability.

parameters.title: Object ID
parameters.name: objectID
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of an object id(sco object id for indicators and vulnerability object id for vulnerabilities)

parameters.title: Object Type
parameters.name: object_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the object type. sdo object type(indicator /or vulnerability)

operations.title: Add Note to Threat Data Object
operations.description: Adds a note to a threat data object

parameters.title: Object Id
parameters.name: object_id
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of the threat data object to create the notes. Else, the note is created as a global note.

parameters.title: Text
parameters.name: text
parameters.tooltip: Pass the description for the notes.

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of the note.

parameters.title: Meta Data
parameters.name: meta_data
parameters.tooltip: Pass the metadata associated with the note.

parameters.title: Is Json
parameters.name: is_json
parameters.tooltip: Pass true if you want to send the note in JSON format.

operations.title: Create Tag
operations.description: Creates a tag in the CTIX platform

parameters.title: Name
parameters.name: name
parameters.tooltip: Pass a unique name for the tag within 50 characters.

parameters.title: Colour Code
parameters.name: colour_code
parameters.tooltip: Pass the HEX key of a color code for the tag.

operations.title: Delete Tag
operations.description: Deletes a tag by the tag ID.

parameters.title: Tag ID
parameters.name: tag_id
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of a tag to delete.

operations.title: List Allowed Indicators
operations.description: Returns a list of allowed indicators from the CTIX platform.

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip: Pass an allowed indicator type to filter result. To retrieve the supported list of allowed indicator types, se the GET List Supported Allowed Indicator Types API.

parameters.title: Page
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Pass the page number to retrieve indicators.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.tooltip: Pass the number of records to retrieve per page.

parameters.title: Created by Id
parameters.name: created_by_id
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of a user to filter records by the creator.

parameters.title: Modified by Id
parameters.name: modified_by_id
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of a user to filter records by the modifier.

parameters.title: Created From
parameters.name: created_from
parameters.tooltip: Pass the created from time in EPOCH format to filter records based on the created time

parameters.title: Created To
parameters.name: created_to
parameters.tooltip: Pass the created to time in EPOCH format to filter records based on the created time.

parameters.title: Last Active From
parameters.name: last_active_from
parameters.tooltip: Pass the last active from time in EPOCH format to filter records based on the last activity time.

parameters.title: Last Active To
parameters.name: last_active_to
parameters.tooltip: Pass the last active to time in EPOCH format to filter records based on the last activity time.

parameters.title: Sort
parameters.name: sort
parameters.tooltip: Pass -created to sort result in descending order based on the created time. Pass created to sort result in ascending order.

operations.title: Delete Allowed Indicator
operations.description: Deletes a particular allowed indicator entry from the dashboard.

parameters.title: Indicator Id
parameters.name: indicator_id
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of an allowed indicator to delete.

operations.title: List Reports
operations.description: Retrieves a list of reports from the CTIX application.

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of report to filter reports. Allowed values: basic, advanced

parameters.title: Page
parameters.name: page
parameters.tooltip: Pass the page number to retrieve reports.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.name: page_size
parameters.tooltip: Pass the number of reports to retrieve per page.

parameters.title: Repeat Type
parameters.name: repeat_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the frequency of the report run schedule. Allowed values: daily, weekly, monthly. Default: none

parameters.title: Shared Type
parameters.name: shared_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the visibility of the reports. Allowed values: private, global

parameters.title: Created By
parameters.name: created_by
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of the user who created the reports.

parameters.title: Modified By
parameters.name: modified_by
parameters.tooltip: Pass the ID of the user who modified the reports.

parameters.title: Created To
parameters.name: created_to
parameters.tooltip: Pass the created from time of the reports in EPOCH format.

parameters.title: Created From
parameters.name: created_from
parameters.tooltip: Pass the created from time of the reports in EPOCH format.

parameters.title: Modified From
parameters.name: modified_from
parameters.tooltip: Pass the modified from time of the reports in EPOCH format.

parameters.title: Modified To
parameters.name: modified_to
parameters.tooltip: Pass the modified to time of the reports in EPOCH format.

parameters.title: Date Last Run From
parameters.name: date_last_run_from
parameters.tooltip: Pass the last run from time of the reports in EPOCH format.

parameters.title: Date Last Run To
parameters.name: date_last_run_to
parameters.tooltip: Pass the last run to time of the reports in EPOCH format.

operations.title: Create Report
operations.description: Creates a basic (standard) report in CTIX.

parameters.title: Name
parameters.name: name
parameters.tooltip: Pass the name of the report.

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of report to be created, such as standard or advanced.

parameters.title: Basic Report Type
parameters.name: basic_report_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of basic report to be created.

parameters.title: Shared Type
parameters.name: shared_type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the share type value. Allowed values: private, global.

parameters.title: Saved Search
parameters.name: saved_search
parameters.tooltip: Pass the saved search or custom query details used for generating the report.

parameters.title: Schedule
parameters.name: schedule
parameters.tooltip: Pass the schedule details such as repeat type, start date and time, duration time, duration value, and repeat value.

parameters.title: File Types
parameters.name: file_types
parameters.tooltip: Pass the report types as a comma separated list, such as csv, xls.

parameters.title: Columns
parameters.name: columns
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of columns to be displayed in a basic report.

parameters.title: Internal Recipients
parameters.name: internal_recipients
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of internal recipients with whom to share the report.

parameters.title: Query Key
parameters.name: query_key
parameters.tooltip: Pass the key to sort data in the report.

parameters.title: External Recipients
parameters.name: external_recipients
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of external recipients with whom to share the report.

operations.title: Run Report
operations.description: Runs a report and sends the file to the recipients

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip: Pass the type of the report to run. Allowed values: basic, advanced

parameters.title: Start Time
parameters.name: start_time
parameters.tooltip: Pass the start date and time in EPOCH format from which the report captures data available in CTIX.

parameters.title: End Time
parameters.name: end_time
parameters.tooltip: Pass the end date and time in EPOCH format until which the report captures data available in CTIX.

parameters.title: File Types
parameters.name: file_types
parameters.tooltip: Pass the report types. Allowed values: csv, xls

parameters.title: Internal Recipients
parameters.name: internal_recipients
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of internal recipients with whom to share the report.

parameters.title: External Recipients
parameters.name: external_recipients
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of external recipients with whom to share the report.

operations.title: Create Custom Attribute
operations.description: Create a custom attribute in the platform.

parameters.title: Name
parameters.name: name
parameters.tooltip: Pass a name for the attribute within 100 characters.

parameters.title: Description
parameters.name: description
parameters.tooltip: Pass a description for the attribute within 500 characters.

parameters.title: Type
parameters.name: type
parameters.tooltip:
Pass the number associated with the type. 
0: Boolean
1: Integer
2: String
3: Single Select
4: Date
5: JSON
6: Float

parameters.title: Choices
parameters.name: choices
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of choices for a single-select attribute.

parameters.title: Is Actionable
parameters.name: is_actionable
parameters.tooltip: Pass true to enable the custom attribute to be modified in threat data objects. Default value: false

parameters.title: Status
parameters.name: status
parameters.tooltip: Pass 1 to activate the attribute. Pass 0 to deactivate the attribute.

parameters.title: Sdo Objects
parameters.name: sdo_objects
parameters.tooltip: Pass the list of SDOs on which you want to list this attribute as actionable.
